## What's new



System:

* Migrated data disk from proprietary CLFD to FAT16
* Added basic ACPI support



GUI:

* Added Context Menu



Apps:

* Added Notepad

* An actual browser

* Support for FAT12

* Improved file manager
* Keyboard layouts
